what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates the attachment identifier att-8e4e5841 with a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-18e75402.
The file body after the frontmatter is empty.
standouts: The attachment uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item.
It records a precise ISO timestamp for when the attachment was added.
conventions: Follows YAML frontmatter metadata convention with a stable id and timestamped 'added' field.
Uses a URI-style target reference (board://...) for cross-artifact linkage.
Leaves the body empty when only metadata is needed.
notes: A lightweight, timestamped linkage record connecting a channel attachment to a board item in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or state does board item item-18e75402 represent?
What operations are expected when an attachment has attachment_type 'board_items'?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as an attachment record and its fields accurately describe that linkage, so stated purpose matches content.
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist the fact that a particular channel attachment refers to a specific board item, making the relationship discoverable and time-bound.
novelty: The target field uses a board:// URI scheme rather than a conventional file path or plain identifier.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a board item, supporting traceability from channel memory to board artifacts without embedding the board content itself.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file in dragnet-development that links attachment att-8e4e5841 to board item item-18e75402 via a board:// URI with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a specific channel attachment references a particular board item and when that reference was created.
